MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MICHAEL HYATT, BERNADINE LIM MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. (Due to the unavailability of Judge Woolard, all calendar matters this date originating out of Department 302, were called from Department 301, by Judge Busch.) No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, moving party failed to provide courtesy copies as ordered on 1/12/2010 and moving party's appeal divests this court of jurisdiction. See CCP section 916. (302/CWW) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Court Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189
